title: rhodocalyx coccineus
intro: Rhodocalyx coccineus, also known as the red-rood or flame flower, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Rhododendron. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhodocalyx coccineus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
